full_text:
Wang Yi (Zhubiao) 王儀 (朱表)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Yi (王儀), styledZhubiao (朱表). Executed for placing the defeat at Dongxing at the hands of Sima Zhao. Wang Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wang Yi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
